text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
All your hard work made this great result
possible.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Thank you so much for always giving your
best effort.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm really glad that everyone knows just how
amazing you are now. ♪
choice_data_list: This is the result of your hard work, Creek.
This is the result of your hard work, Creek.

But that doesn't mean we can just take it easy
now!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm really glad that everyone knows just how
amazing you are now. ♪
choice_data_list: This is the result of your hard work, Creek.
This is the result of your hard work, Creek.

But that doesn't mean we can just take it easy
now!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The fact that you're able to be considerate of
others like that...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It just goes to show what an incredibly amazing
person you are.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do my best! I'll do whatever it takes
to see your smiling face again next time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Gosh... I'm already thinking about next time,
aren't I?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: That's my trainer—always setting a great example!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And of course, you can count on me to support
you with all I've got!
